name: Web Decisions
description: Standard for an explainable, reproducible decision record — why a rules/criteria evaluation reached its outcome. For each criterion: its input, operator, threshold, and the outcome it contributed, aggregated into a finding against a versioned ruleset the record carries so the explanation replays. A schema-only interchange contract: the DecisionRecord shape is the lock (no provider) — an underwriting engine, an eligibility engine, a pricing or moderation engine all emit the same record, so Web Reporting and Web Compliance consume any of them and audit-trail logs each as one event. Distinct from the rule engine + proof machinery (proof-of-compliance, #093), from Web Validation (form-field invalidity), and from Web Traces (execution spans): this is the decision's explanation artifact.
